In addition,Y mark for each relevant trend or calculation which form part of a relevant explanation of the risk(max 2 marks). Management bias Revenue recognition Revenue recognition Disposal of properties to Larsenn Enterprises Share-based payment expense Provision for repair costs Insurance claim for repair costs Impairment of flood damaged hotels Operating expenses(2 marks) Deferred tax asset Maximum Marks 23 解析： 背景解析： BRANSFIELD It is 1 July 20X5.You are a manager in the audit department of Dumont &Co,a firm of Chartered Certified Accountants.You are assigned to the audit of Bransfield Co which has a financial year ending 30 September 20X5.Your firm has been responsible for the audit of Bransfield Co for the last four years. The following exhibits,available on the left-hand side of the screen,provide information relevant to the question:

stem_zh: 1. Partner's email -an email which you have received from Finn Drake,the audit engagement partner.
2. Business developments -summary of business developments discussed at a recent meeting between the chief finance officer (CFO)and the audit engagement partner.

3. Financial information -extracts from Bransfield Co's most recent management accounts and accompanying notes. Notes from the engagement partner regarding climate -related risks. This information should be used to answer the question requirement within your chosen response option(s). 年底时间30/9/20X5, 过去四年都是我们的审计客户 Requirement
explanation_zh: Required: Respond to the instructions in the email from the audit engagement partner. (40 marks) Note:The split of the mark allocation is shown in the partner's email(Exhibit 1). Professional marks will be awarded for the demonstration of skill in communication, analysis and evaluation,professional scepticism and judgement and commercial acumen in your answer. (10 marks) Exhibit 1-Email from audit engagement partner To:Audit manager From:Finn Drake,Audit engagement partner Subject:Audit planning for Bransfield Co Date:1 July 20X5 Hello I have provided you with some information in the form of a number of exhibits which you should use to help you with planning the audit of Bransfield Co for the financial year ending 30 September 20X5. Based on the analysis I have done on this industry,it is appropriate for overall materiality to be based on the profitability of the company as this is a key focus for investors. I require you to prepare briefing notes for my own use in which you: a. Using the information provided in Exhibits 1,2 and 3,evaluate and prioritise the significant audit risks to be considered in planning the audit of Bransfield Co. Note:You are not required to consider the deferred tax consequences of the share -based payment scheme at this time as this will be looked at separately later in the planning stage of the audit. (23 marks) 本题要求找出audit risk, 所以要考虑是否题中是否有控制风险和检查风险，在答案中都要 提及，materiality 2分 ，audit risk 每点2-3分，故需要写7点左右。 案例和答案解析： Exhibit 2-Business developments Bransfield Co operates a chain of 95 luxury hotels.Revenue is generated from the letting of hotel rooms,conference and meeting rooms. 6.A 20%deposit is taken when a booking is made. This year's results show a return to profitability for the company,following several years of losses.Hotel trade journals show that on average,revenue in the industry has increased by around 20%this year.Despite improved profitability,Bransfield Co has poor liquidity,and is currently trying to secure further long -term finance from the bank.

stem_zh: 1. Bransfield Co owned all of its hotels until January 20X5 when eight properties were sold to Larsenn Enterprises.Bransfield Co entered into a management contract with Larsenn Enterprises and is continuing to operate the eight hotels under a 15-year agreement.Under the terms of the management contract, Bransfield Co pays an annual rental to Larsenn Enterprises for the eight hotels which is recognised within operating expenses.At the end of the contract,Bransfield Co has the option to repurchase the hotels, and it is likely that the option will be exercised. In April 20X5,Bransfield Co granted share options to executives and senior management of the company as a way of providing performance related rewards without impacting cash flow. 2.The estimated expense of the share option scheme in the year ending 30 September 20X5 is $14 million. The expense of the scheme is being recognised in profit or loss over the five year vesting period. It is currently assumed that all of the options will vest and the expense is calculated on that basis. In June 20X5,three hotels situated near a major river were severely damaged by a flood. 3.All of the hotels,which were constructed by Bransfield Co only two years ago, need extensive repairs and refurbishment at an estimated cost of $15 million, which has been provided in full and recognised within operating expenses.4. All of the buildings are insured for damage caused by flooding. The repair work is expected to commence in August 20X5 and be completed in December 20X5. The hotels are currently closed whilst the repairs are undertaken and it is expected that they will reopen in January 20X6.5 Management have not performed an impairment review of these properties as they are due to be repaired within the next six months. Exhibit 3-Financial information Notes Projected 30 September 20X5 Actual 30 September 20X4 $million $million 6.Revenue 890 713 Operating expenses 1 (835) (690) Other operating income 2 135 10 —— —— —— Operating profit 190 33 Finance charges (45) (43) 一 — Profit/(loss)before tax 145 (10) —— — — Property,plant and equipment 1,265 1,135 Deferred tax asset 3 285 335 Total assets 2,870 2,230
1. Significant items included in operating expenses:
7. 20X5 20X4 $m $m Share -based payment expense 14 一 Damaged property repair expenses 15 一

2. Other operating income Other operating income for the year ended 30 September 20X5 includes a profit on disposal of $125 million arising from the sale of eight properties to Larsenn Enterprises. 3 Deferred tax asset 8.The deferred tax asset represents unutilised tax losses which accumulated in the loss making periods 20X1-20X4 inclusive.Deferred tax losses can only be carried forward to be utilised against profits generated from the same trade.Bransfield Co is confident that future taxable trading profits will be generated in order for the tax losses to be utilised. Materiality For the purposes of these briefing notes the following overall materiality level will be used to assess the significance of identified risks and as requested this has been based on the profitability of the company.废话 Benchmarks The profit before tax includes a significant profit on disposal of $125 million which distorts this year's figure and potentially should not be recognised at all (discussed later in the briefing notes).Therefore,an adjusted profit before tax of $20 million should be used for the materiality assessment.Using the adjusted profit before tax of $20 million as a suggested benchmark results in a suggested range of $1 million(5%×$20 million)to $2 million(10% ×$20 million). Although this is an existing client,there are a number of significant risks which indicates that materiality should be set at the lower end of the range at $1 million. These benchmarks are only a starting point for determining materiality and professional judgement will need to be applied in determining a final level to be used during the course of the audit. 重要性水平应基于利润计算，且客户的利润中有一个较大错误，所以应将错误剔除后再计 算重要性水平。另外由于客户的风险较高，所以我们会选择较低的重要性水平 以下风险是priortize 之后的风险 9 Management bias There are several indicators of management bias which are discussed in more detail within the briefing notes.These include the profit on disposal,no impairment review planned for the flood damaged hotels,recognition of a significant deferred tax asset which may be overstated,and the potential understatement of operating expenses. These treatments may have been chosen to help with securing finance from the bank.The accounting treatments used by management have the effect of increasing profit and total assets which will be important considerations for the bank when making its lending decision.
options_zh: ["A. 题中有很多迹象表明可能有management bias b) 管理层可能借用做账来高估profit 和 total assets, 从而操纵报表 6Revenue recognition Bransfield Co's revenue is fo ecast to increase by 24.8%in 20X5 compared to an industry average of only 20%. In accordance with IFRSR 15 Revenue From Contracts with Customers,revenue should only be recognised when or as a performance obligation is satisfied.As such, revenue should be recognised over the period of room occupation. Therefore, on receipt of a deposit prior to the occupation of the room,the revenue should be deferred and instead a contract liability should be recognised. Liabilities may therefore be understated and revenue and profit overstated if deposits are recognised as revenue on receipt.", "A. 今年收入增长24.8%, 而行业平均增长只有20% b ) 准则：收入要随着/当满足义务的时候确认 c) 风险：公司在收到20%定金的时候应该递延收入，而不能直接确认收入 d ) 低估liability, 高估revenue 和 profitDuring the year,eight hotels have been sold to Larsenn Enterprises with a profit on disposal of $125 million being recognised in the statement of profit or loss.This s material based on the threshold of $1 million calculated above.1Disposal of properties to Larsenn Enterprises d ) 低估liability, 高估revenue 和 profit During the year,eight hotels have been sold to Larsenn Enterprises with a profit on disposal of $125 million being recognised in the statement of profit or loss.This s material based on the threshold of $1 million calculated above. A management contract has been entered into whereby Bransfield Co continues to rent the hotels and has the option to repurchase them at the end of the contract. In accordance with IFRS 16 Leases,if the sale does not represent the satisfaction of a performance obligation in accordance with IFRS 15,the transfer is not a sale. In this case,the assets should continue to be recognised on the statement of financial position of Bransfield Co,_and the proceeds received on the ‘sale' recognised as a financial liability.There should be no profit recorded on the transaction. It appears that the substance of this transaction is more a financing arrangement than a genuine sale.Bransfield Co has retained operational control of the assets.In addition,the option to repurchase in 15 years’time indicates that at that time Bransfield Co will be repaying the long term finance secured on the properties. Currently other operating income is overstated by the 'profit on disposal'of $125 million.Property plant and equipment is understated by the carrying amount of the properties ‘sold',and liabilities understated by the amount of finance raised.Without this,operating profit would reduce by 66%from $190 million to $65 million. In addition, Bransfield Co will need to continue to depreciate the properties. Operating expenses are currently understated due to the lack of depreciation on the disposed properties since the date of disposal but overstated due to the rental payments. Finally,as the 'sale'is in reality a finance arrangement,Bransfield Co should accrue finance charges.The total finance charge associated with the sale and repurchase arrangement should be allocated over the period of the finance.Finance charges are understated due to the lack of inclusion of finance cost in relation to the financing arrangement. a ) 重要性水平 b) 准则：不满足销售条件的要继续确认在SOFP 中。", "C. 风险：公司把PPE 确认成了sale , 并且没有继续折旧 d) 错报：高估 other operating income, 低估 PPE, 低估利润 2Share -based payment expense A share based payment expense of $14 million has been recognised this year for the first time.This is material based on the threshold of $1 million calculated above. IFRS 2 Share -based Payment requires the expense of an equity -settled scheme to be recognised over the vesting period and calculated using the fair value of the share options at the grant date.At each reporting date the expense should be calculated by considering whether performance conditions attached to the share options will be met. The assumption that all the share options will vest seems unlikely because some of the executives and senior management team might leave the company before the end of the five year vesting period. Staff turnover/staff retention should be considered when making these assumptions. It is also important for the measurement of the expense that it has been calculated based on the share options being granted mid -way through the accounting period. Operating expenses and equity will be overstated if the assumption regarding all of the share options vesting is incorrect or if an inappropriate fair value has been used. a ) 重要性水平 b) 准则：股权激励需要根据授予日的公允价格来计算，并且每年年底要考虑是否满足 条件 c) 风险：公司认为所有的期权都会行权的假设可能不准确 d) 错报：高估operating expense 和equity 3Provision for repair costs A provision of $15 million has been recognised within operating expenses relating to repairs which are expected to be completed in December 20X5.This is material based on the threshold of $1 million calculated above. In accordance with IASR 37 Provisions,Contingent Liabilities and Contingent Assets, a provision should only be recognised if there is a present obligation as a result of a past event.A provision cannot be made for future costs unless there is a constructive or legal obligation to perform the repairs at the year end. There is unlikely to be any legal or constructive obligation attached to this situation so a provision should not be recognised. Any costs incurred in August and September 20X5 should be expensed in the current year financial statements.Any expected costs to be incurred after the year end should be recognised in next year's financial statements. Operating expenses and provision liabilities will be overstated by the amount of repair costs expected to be incurred after the year end. a ) 重要性水平 b) 准则：只有当公司因为过去发生的事项而导致有现时义务的时候才可以确 认预计负债 C) 风险：现在并不能确定公司是否有现时义务，所以在8-9月发生的成本应 该费用化，而年后的成本应该记在下一年的财报 d) 错报：高估operating expense和 provision liability。 4Insurance claim for repair costs The buildings are covered by an insurance policy,which will pay out for repair and refurbishment costs to the assets.If the insurance company has formally notified Bransfield Co that it will settle he insurance claim and the amount has not been received by the year end,a receivable should be recognised as the payment will be deemed virtually certain.If no formal confirmation has been given by the insurance company,but it is probable that the claim willbe settled,a contingent asset should be disclosed. There is a risk that other receivables will be overstated if the settlement of the insurance claim is not virtually certain.If the settlement is deemed probable,there is a risk that adequate disclosure of the contingent asset is not made.", "A. 准则：只有当可以收到钱的概率是virtually certain 的时候，才能确认为 receivables。如果概率是 probable, 那么就应该作为 contingent assets 来披 露 。", "B. 风险：收到钱的概率不是virtually certain, 而公司已经确认了 receivables C) 错报：高估 receivables , 或者披露不充分 5Impairment of flood damaged hotels Management have not performed an impairment review of these properties on the basis that they are due to be repaired within the next six months. An impairment review should have been performed for the flood damaged hotels as the recoverable amount may have fallen below carrying amount. The recoverable amount is the higher of value in use and fair value less costs to sell. In their current condition,the hotels will have suffered a reduction in value in use as the hotels are closed and cannot be used due to their extensive damage.If they were to be sold it is expected that the fair value will be substantially reduced due to their condition. There is a risk that the property carrying amounts are overstated and expenses understated if an impairment charge is necessary but not made.", "A. 准则：当资产的可回收金额可能低于账面金额的时候，需要做减值测试。", "B. 风险：公司发生了洪水，但是管理层并没有做任何的减值测试 C) 错报：高估 PPE, 低 估expense 7Operating expenses A comparison of operating expenses for the two years reveals an unusual trend.The operating expenses for 20X5 include two new significant items -the share-based payment expense of $14 million,and the repair expense of $15 million. Once these have been eliminated to enable a meaningful comparison to the previous year,the 20X5 operating expenses is $806 million ($835-14-15). Removing the effect of the new costs and the other operating income from operating profit to allow for comparability with the prior year, the operating profit margin has increased from 3.2%(713-690/713×100)to 9.4%(890-806/890×100),which is a three -fold increase. Given that revenue has increased by 24.8%(as discussed above),it would appear likely that operating expenses for the current year are understated.", "A. operating expense 里面的share-based payment 和 repair expense 金额 都很大，可以把这两个移除然后和去年的 operating expense进行对比 b ) OPM 从去年的3.2%涨到9.4% C) 今年的收入上涨24.8%, operating expense很可能被低估 8Deferred tax asset The deferred tax asset of $285 million is material based on the threshold calculated above. IAS 12 Income Taxes states that a deferred tax asset can only be recognised where carried forward for offset against future taxable profits,so Bransfield Co mustthe utilisation of the asset can be demonstrated. Unutilised tax losses can be carried forward for offset against future taxable profits,so Bransfield Co must demonstrate using budgets and forecasts,that it is probable that future taxable demonstrate using budgets and forecasts,that it is probable that future taxable profits will be available for the losses to be fully utilised. If this cannot be demonstrated then the deferred tax asset recognised should be restricted to the level of future profits that can be measured with reasonable certainty. The financial statements currently show a profit before tax of $145 million,indicating healthy performance. However,when the profit on asset disposal is removed from profit before tax,and if further adjustments are necessary in respect of the items discussed above,profitability could be much lower than management anticipates. It may be difficult for the company to demonstrate that the tax losses are able to be fully utilised in future.If this is the case,then the deferred tax asset is overstated. a ) 重要性水平 b) 准则：只有当公司未来是可以盈利的情况下，才可以使用递延所得税资产 C) 风险：如果把公司今年处置资产的利润移除，公司的盈利水平其实下降很 多 d) 错报：如果公司未来没办法盈利，那么就高估了deferred tax asset 题号：AAA Mock exam Q1b(i)(ii) 本 题 核 心 知 识 点 ： Audit procedure -share-based payment expense;Audit procedure - deferred tax asset 官方答案： 得分标准： 解 (b) 析： Audit procedures 1 mark for each well explained audit procedure,examples of which include: (i) Measurement of share-based payment expense Agree components of calculation to scheme documentation Recalculate expense and check vesting period Agree grant date,fair values,etc.to specialist report 一Review forecast staffing levels for consistency with the assumption that staff turnover will be zero 一 Discuss forecast staffing levels with HR representative Perform sensitivity analysis on assumptions Obtain written representation regarding the reasonableness of the assumptions (ii) Recognition and measurement of deferred tax asset Obtain client tax comp and deferred tax schedules,recalculate Develop independent estimate of future taxable profits Evaluate assumptions used in the profitability forecasts Assess time period for losses to be utilised Inspect correspondence from the tax authority to confirm no restriction on c/f of losses Maximum 9 背景"]
explanation_zh: 见上题 Requirement解析： (b) Design the principal audit procedures to be carried out in respect of the following: i.The measurement of the share-based payment expense ii. The recognition and measurement of the deferred tax asset. (9 marks) 针对share-based payemnt和 deferred tax asset 写审计程序，一共9分，可以分别写4/5条 案例和答案解析： (i) Measurement of share-based payment expense 股份支付 -Obtain management calculation of the expense and agree the following from the calculation to the contractual terms of the scheme: 获取到管理层对于费用的计算，核对到： -Number of employees and executives granted options 员工数量和授予的期 权 -Number of options granted per employee 每个员工的期权数量 -The official grant date of the share options 期权日期 -Vesting period for the scheme 行权时间 -Required performance conditions attached to the options. 行权条件 -Recalculate the expense and check that the fair value has been correctly spread over the stated vesting period. 重新计算费用，检查公允价值准确记录 -Agree fair value of share options to specialist's report and calculation,and evaluate whether the specialist report is a reliable source of evidence. 将期权的公允价值与专 家的报告和计算核对，进行评估 -Agree that the fair value calculated is at the grant date.核对公允价值是在授予日计 算的 -Obtain and review a forecast of staffing levels or employee turnover rates for the duration of the vesting period,and scrutinise the assumptions used to predict level of staff turnover. 检查公司人员理智情况，确认公司假设是否合理 -Discuss previous levels of staff turnover with a representative of the human resources department and query why 0%staff turnover has been predicted for the duration of the vesting period. 和人事部讨论公司预测0%离职率的原因 -Perform sensitivity analysis on the assumptions used in the valuation,focusing on the assumption of 0%staff turnover. 对假设进行敏感性分析 -Obtain written representation from management confirming that the assumptions used in measuring the expense are reasonable. (ii)Recognition and measurement of deferred tax asset 递延所得税资产 -Obtain a copy of Bransfield Co's current tax computation and deferred tax calculations and agree figures to any relevant tax correspondence and/or underlying accounting records. 获取到公司的税务计算，核对到相关的记录/往来信函 -Develop an independent expectation of the estimate of future taxable profits to corroborate the reasonableness of management's estimate.评估管理层对未来盈利的 估计的合理性 -Obtain forecasts of profitability and agree that there is sufficient forecast taxable profit available for the losses to be offset against.Evaluate the assumptions used in the forecast against business understanding.In particular consider assumptions regarding the growth rate of taxable profit in light of the underlying detrimental trend in profit before tax. 评估预测表的合理性 -Assess the time period it will take to generate sufficient profits to utilise the tax losses.If it is going to take a number of years to generate such profits,it may be that the recognition of the asset should be restricted.评估公司可以盈利的年限 -Inspect correspondence from the tax authority to confirm there is no restriction on the ability of Bransfield Co to carry the losses forward and to use the losses against future taxable profits.检查公司与税务机关的往来信函 题号：AAA Mock exam Q1c 本题核心知识点：climate-related risk 官方答案： 得分标准： Generally up to 1 mark for each point discussed. Understanding the entity,exposure to CRR - Hotels could be affected by floods,fires,hurricanes Consider client’s risk assessment procedures Identification of ROMM related to climate factors Impact on materiality assessment May be material by nature Be alert to changes in laws and regulations as this is developing area Designing appropriate audit procedures responsive to risks Reliance on auditor's expert in respect of hotel property valuations Going concern impact Maximum 解析： 背景解析： Exhibit 4-Notes from the engagement partner regarding climate -related risks The International Auditing and Assurance Standards Board(IAASB)has issued an audit practice alert relating to the auditor's consideration of climate -related risks. We will need to make sure we follow this guidance as Bransfield Co is becoming more exposed to climate -related risks such as flooding affecting hotels as mentioned in Exhibit 2.Other clients within the hospitality industry are also seeing evidence of climate-related risks where they have hotels located in areas affected by hurricanes and bush fires which are occurring with greater frequency. We will need to adapt our audit approach accordingly for key audit areas that are impacted by such events. Requirement解析： (c)Using the information provided in Exhibit 4,discuss how climate -related risks should be considered by the audit team during the audit of Bransfield Co.You are not required to consider the impact of such matters on the auditor's report,just the planning and performance of the audit. (8 marks) 在审计的时候审计师需要考虑的相关风险，不要提及审计报告的影响 案例和答案解析： During the planning stage,we must obtain an understanding of the entity and the industry and the level of exposure the client has to climate -related risks(CRR). These risks must be taken into consideration when identifying and assessing risks of material misstatement and designing appropriate audit procedures. For hotel chains such as Bransfield Co,there is evidence of CRR in relation to the flood damaged hotels.It is possible that further risks could arise in future if hotels are damaged by events such as hurricanes,bush fires or other natural disasters caused by climate change.未来酒店可能还会被其他自然灾害毁坏 The client should have their own risk assessment procedures which identifies which locations are exposed to such damage and we should consider the client's own risk assessment procedures when considering the effectiveness of the client's system of internal control. 客 户 需 要 有 自 己 的 风 险 评 估 流 程 ， 审 计 师 需 要 考 虑 客 户 公 司 内 控系统的有效性 Locations exposed to CRR may have risks of material misstatement related to impairment of hotels,treatment of repair costs,provisions and contingencies,going concern,adequacy of disclosures,amongst others. 重大错报风险 Due to the relationship between risk and materiality,the assessment of CRR will also impact the determination of materiality,with preliminary materiality likely to be set at a lower amount where there is exposure to CRR. 重要性水平可能需要设置 的更低 We must also consider the information needs of users and assess whether certain balances and disclosures affected by CRR will influence users'decisions as these may be material by nature. 审计师需要考虑报表使用者的需要，以及是否会影响到 使用者的决策判断 Some governments have brought in requirements for disclosures relating to CRR and therefore we willneed to ensure compliance with any requirements and be alert to any changes that come into force. 审计师需要保证公司有按照政府要求去披露 CRR The results of our risk assessment will influence the design of our audit procedures in relation to impairment of assets,provisions and contingencies,disclosures,etc. 风 险评估结果会影响审计师的审计程序设计 Where balances are affected by estimation uncertainty such as valuation of hotel properties which may be affected by impairment,an auditor's expert may need to be used to provide audit evidence.The requirements of ISA 620 Using the Work of an Auditor's Expert will therefore apply. 如果有会计估计不确定性，审计师需要找自己 的专家来提供审计证据 Where extreme weather is becoming more common causing devastating effects year on year, management will need to consider this when assessing the ability to continue as a going concern. This will then impact our evaluation of management's use of the going concern basis of accounting,and when assessing the adequacy of disclosures of material uncertainties relating to going concern. 管理层要评估公司的 可持续经营情况，如果有重大不确定性，需要充分披露 Conclusion 结论 These briefing notes highlight that there are a number of significant audit risks which will need to be carefully considered during the planning of the audit,to ensure that an appropriate audit strategy is devised.In particular,the audit risks relating to the disposal of the eight hotels needs careful consideration due to the impact on profit for the year.We need to perform detailed work on the share -based payment scheme and the deferred tax asset,as outlined in the notes.Climate -related risks are becoming more significant and we will need to plan and perform our audit to ensure compliance with the IAASB practice alert. 题号：AAA Mock exam Q2 a 本题核心知识点：matters to consider 官方答案： 得分标准： (a) Matters to be included in the terms of agreement Up to 2 marks for each matter identified and explained: 一 Management's responsibilities - Intended use of the information and report The contents of the business plan 一 The period covered by the forecasts 一 The nature of assumptions used in the forecasts 一 The format and planned content of the assurance report Maximum Marks 6 解析： 背景解析： AMUNDSEN It is 1 July 20X5.You are a manager in Davis &Co,a firm which offers a range of services to audit and non -audit clients.You have been asked to consider a potential engagement to provide an assurance report on the prospective financial information of Amundsen Co,an existing audit client.The audit of the financial statements for the year ended 31 May 20X5 has just commenced. The following exhibits,available on the left-hand side of the screen,provide information relevant to the question:

stem_zh: 1. Amundsen Co-information regarding Amundsen Co and the review engagement your firm is invited to provide.

2. Forecast financial statements -a forecast statement of profit or loss,forecast statement of financial position and supporting notes. Update following the engagement procedures performed on the prospective financial information. This information should be used to answer the question requirements within the response option(s)provided. Amundsen Co是事务所的审计客户，现在他要求事务所提供他们预测的财务信息的鉴 证服务，以下是相关信息： Exhibit 1-Amundsen Co Amundsen Co owns commercial real estate properties,typically comprising several floors of retail units and leisure facilities such as cinemas and health clubs,which are rented out to provide rental income. Your firm has just been approached to provide an additional engagement for Amundsen Co, to review and provide a report on the company's business plan, including forecast financial statements for the 12-month period to 31 May 20X6. Amundsen Co is in the process of negotiating a new bank loan of $30 million and the report on the business plan is at the request of the bank. It is anticipated that the loan would be advanced in Auqust 20X5 and would carry an interest rate of 4%. The report would be provided by your firm's business advisory department and an engagement quality review will be conducted which will reduce any threat to objectivity to an acceptable level. Amundsen Co is planning to invest the cash raised from the bank loan in a new retail and leisure park which is being developed jointly with another company, Lazarev Co. All key decisions about the new retail and leisure park will require the unanimous consent of Amundsen Co and Lazarev Co. 事务所要给 Amundsen Co 做商业计划，包括未来12个余额的预测报表。银行考虑 是否贷款给Amundsen , 并且要求出具商业计划。 Amundsen 公司在考虑和 Lazarev 公司共同合作。 Exhibit 2-Forecast financial statements Statement of profit or loss Note FORECAST UNAUDITED 12 months to 12 months to 31 May 20X6 31 May 20X5 $000 $000 Revenue 25,000 20,600 Operating expenses (16,550) (14,420) Operating profit 8,450 6,180 Profit on disposal of 4,720 一 Bellinghausen Retail Finance costs (2,650) (1,690) Profit before tax 10,520 4,490 of financial position Note FORECAST UNAUDITED Assets As at 31 May 20X6 $000 12 months to 31 May 20X5 $000 Non -current assets 2 330,150 293,000 Current assets Inventories 500 450 Receivables 3,600 3,300 Cash and cash equivalents Total assets Equity and liabilities 2,250 6,350 336,500 3,750 7,500 300,500 Equity Share capital 105,000 100,000 Retained earnings Total equity Non -current liabilities 93,400 198,400 92,600 192,600 Long -term borrowings 3 82,500 52,500 Deferred tax Current liabilities Trade payables 50,000 5,600 50,000 5,400 Total liabilities Total equity and liabilities 138,100 336,500 107,900 300,500 Notes:

1. Bellinghausen Retail is a retail park which is underperforming. Its sale is currently being negotiated,and is expected to take place in September 20X5.As at 31 May 20X5,the retail park did not meet the conditions to be classified as an asset held for sale.

2. Non -current assets include investment properties and property,plant and equipment,which are measured at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment losses.The forecast includes the planned investment in the new retail and leisure park being developed with Lazarev Co.

3. Amundsen Co is in the process of negotiating a new bank loan of $30 million which will be used to finance the joint arrangement with Lazarev Co. Exhibit 3-Update following the engagement procedures It is now 5 August 20X5 and the engagement procedures have been completed and the assurance report on the forecast financial statements is due to be issued in the next few days. The manager in charge of the engagement has concluded that the assumptions over revenue and the profit on disposal of the retail park are too optimistic. The matter has been discussed with management but they have refused to revise the forecasts as they are concerned the bank would not approve the loan application based on the assurance provider's proposed adjustments. 项目经理认为预测表中使用的假设太过乐观，但公司管理层拒绝修改。 (a)Requirement
explanation_zh: (a) Using the information in Exhibit 1,identify and explain the matters that should be considered in agreeing the terms of the engagement. (6 marks) 审计师在核对业务条款的时候应该考虑的因素 案例和答案解析： Agreeing the terms of engagement Management's responsibilities The terms of the engagement should set out management's responsibilities for the preparation of the business plan and forecast financial statements,including all assumptions used,and for providing the auditor with all relevant information and source data used in developing the assumptions.This is to clarify the roles of management and of Davis &Co,and reduce the scope for any misunderstanding. 管理层负责准备商业计划和预测报表，分清楚管理层与事务所各自的责任 The intended use of the business plan and report It should be confirmed that the report will be provided to the bank and that it will not be distributed or made available to other parties. This will establish the potential liability of Davis &Co to third parties,and help to determine the need and extent of any liability disclaimer that may be considered necessary.Davis &Co should also establish that the bank will use the report only in helping to reach a decision in respect of the additional finance being sought by Amundsen Co. 确认信息使用者只有银行，以及银行获取报告只是为了决定是否融资 The elements of the business plan to be covered by the engagement The extent of the engagement should be agreed. Davis &Co need to determine whether they are being asked to report just on the forecast financial statements,or on the whole business plan including any narrative descriptions or explanations of Amundsen Co's intended future business activities. This will help to determine the scope of the work involved and its complexity. 确定审计师的工作范围 The period covered by the forecasts This should be confirmed when agreeing the terms of the engagement,as assumptions become more speculative as the length of the period covered increases, making it more difficult for Davis &Co to substantiate the acceptability of the figures,and increasing the risk of the engagement. It should also be confirmed that a 12-month forecast period is sufficient for the bank's purposes. 确认预测财报的预测时间，比如未来一年是否足够 The nature of the assumptions used in the business plan Davis &Co must determine the nature of assumptions,especially whether the assumptions are based on best estimates or are hypothetical. This is important because ISAE 3400 The Examination of Prospective Financial Information states that the auditor should not accept,or should withdraw from,an engagement when the assumptions are clearly unrealistic or when the auditor believes that the prospective financial information will be inappropriate for its intended use. 确认使用 的假设是否现实，否则会导致财务信息不准确 The planned contents of the assurance report The engagement letter should confirm the planned elements of the report to be issued,to avoid any misunderstanding with management. In particular,Davis &Co should clarify that the report will contain a statement of negative assurance as to whether the assumptions provide a reasonable basis for the prospective financial information,and a conclusion as to whether the prospective financial information is properly prepared on the basis of the assumptions and is presented in accordance with the relevant financial reporting framework. The bank may require the report to be in a particular format and include specific wording in order to make its lending decision. 报告中都需要包含什么内容，比如银行是否在格式上和用词上有特殊要求 题号：AAA Mock exam Q2b 本题核心知识点：Audit procedures-forecast financial statements 官方答案： 得分标准： Procedures on forecast financial statements Up to 1mark for each procedure.Award credit for other relevant procedures: Re-calculate forecast - Agree the unaudited figures for the period to 31 May 20X5 to management accounts,and agree the cash figure to bank statement or bank reconciliation Consistency of accounting policies used - Consider accuracy of forecasts prepared in prior periods - Review agreement with Lazarev Co and discuss how joint arrangement has been included Discuss the reason for the anticipated increase in revenue Discuss the reason for the anticipated increase in operating profit Obtain a breakdown of operating expenses and review for omissions Consider whether depreciation charges have increased in line with the planned capital expenditure Request confirmation from the bank of the potential terms of the $30 million loan Discuss the potential sale of Bellinghausen Retail with management Recalculate profit on disposal,agreement of components to supporting documentation Agree the potential proceeds on disposal to management's cash flow forecast Discuss the reason for not including income tax expense in the profit forecast Agree the increase in non-current assets to an authorised capital expenditure budget Obtain and review a reconciliation of the movement in non-current assets Discuss the planned increase in equity with management Enquire why forecast equity does not include a share premium account Perform analytical procedures on working capital and discuss trends with management Agree the increase in long-term borrowings to documentation relating to the new loan Discuss the deferred tax provision with management and why there is no movement Obtain and review a forecast statement of changes in equity Agree the movement in cash,and the forecast closing cash position to a cash flow forecast Maximum 解析 ： 背景解析 ： 见上题 Requirement解析： (b)Using the information in Exhibits 1 and 2,design the examination procedures which should be performed in the examination of the forecast financial statements of Amundsen Co for the year to 31 May 20X6.(10marks) 针对预测财报审计师可以做的审计程序 案例和答案解析： (b) General procedures -Recalculate the forecast financial statements to confirm the arithmetic accuracy. 重新计算财报准确性 -Agree the unaudited figures for the period to 31 May 20X5 to management accounts,and agree the cash figure to bank statement or bank reconciliation. 将未审 计的数字核对到公司账，并且将现金余额核对到银行对帐单或银行余额调节表 -Confirm the consistency of the accounting policies used in the preparation of the forecast financial statements with those used in the last audited financial statements. 确认会计政策使用一致 -Consider the accuracy of forecasts prepared in prior periods by comparison with actual results and discuss with management the reasons for any significant variances .将预测与实际结果进行比较，看是否有重大差异 -Review any agreement with Lazarev Co,or minutes of meetings at which the joint arrangement has been discussed to understand the nature,scale,and timeframe of the proposed joint business arrangement and discuss the extent to which the joint arrangement with Lazarev Co has been included in the forecast financial statements. 检查和Lazarev Co的协议或会议纪要，了解joint arrangement的情况 Forecast statement of profit or loss -Consider the reasonableness of forecast trends in the light of auditor's knowledge of Amundsen Co's business and the current and forecast economic situation and any other relevant external factors.考 虑Amundsen Co公司预测的合理性 -Discuss the reason for the anticipated 21.4%increase in revenue with management,to understand if the increase is due to the inclusion of figures relating to the joint arrangement with Lazarev Co,or other factors. 和管理层讨论收入的增长 以及是否因为和 Lazarev Co合作有关 -Discuss the trend in operating profit with management -the operating margin is forecast to improve from 30%to 33.8%.This improvement may be due to the sale of the underperforming Bellinghausen Retail Park. 和管理层讨论oeprating margin的 增 长以及是否与卖掉经营不善的 Bellinghausen Retail Park 有 关 -Obtain a breakdown of items included in forecast operating expenses and compare to those included in the 20X5 management accounts to identify any omissions . 获取到operating expense 预测的清单与20X5 年的账进行对比 -Using the cost breakdown,consider whether depreciation charges have increased in line with the planned capital expenditure.看成本清单，考虑是否有折旧费用的增长 -Request confirmation from the bank of the potential terms of the $30 million loan being negotiated,to confirm the interest rate at 4%.Consider whether the finance charge in the forecast statement of profit or loss appears reasonable.(If the loan is advanced in August,it should increase the company's finance charge by $1 million ($30 million×4%×10/12).) 获取关于$30m 贷款的银行询证函 -Discuss the potential sale of Bellinghausen Retail with management and review relevant board minutes,to obtain understanding of the likelihood of the sale,and the main terms of the sale negotiation. 和管理层讨论 Bellinghausen Retail可能出售的情 况 ，检查相关会议纪要，了解出售情况 -Recalculate the profit on the planned disposal,agreeing the potential proceeds to any written documentation relating to the sale,vendor's due diligence report,or draft legal documentation if available. 重新计算 profit on dispoal并进行核对 -Agree the potential proceeds on disposal to management's cash flow forecast,and confirm that operating cash flows relevant to Bellinghausen Retail are not included from the anticipated date of its sale. 将可能进行的出售与 CF Forecast进行核对，确 保卖出之后没有包含相关的现金流 -Discuss the reason for not including income tax expense in the profit forecast.和管 理层讨论为什么 profit forecast不包含income tax expense Forecast statement of financial position -Agree the increase in non -current assets to an authorised capital expenditure budget,and to any plans for the joint development with Lazarev Co. 核对 NCA 的增 加看是否有授权 -Obtain and review a reconciliation of the movement in non -current assets. Agree that all assets relating to Bellinghausen Retail are derecognised on its disposal,and that any assets relating to the joint development with Lazarev Co are recognised in accordance with capital expenditure forecasts,and are properly recognised per IFRS 11 Joint Arrangements. 检查NCA 的余额调节，与 disposal 和 joint development 核对 -Discuss the planned increase in equity with management to understand the reason for any planned share issue,its date and the nature of the share issue(rights issue or issue at full market price being the most likely).和管理层讨论是否计划发行 股票以及时间和性质 -Enquire of management why forecast equity does not include a share premium account as the proceeds of the share issue would be likely to be in excess of nominal value. 询问管理层预测表中没有share premium的原因 -Perform analytical procedures on working capital and discuss trends with management,for example,the receivables collection period is forecast to reduce from 58 to 53 days,and the reason for this should be obtained. 对 working capital 进 行分析型程序并讨论 -Agree the increase in long -term borrowings to documentation relating to the new loan,and also to the forecast cash flow statement(where it should be included as a cash flow arising from financing activities). 核对长期借款的增长，看是否有新的贷 款 -Discuss the deferred tax provision with management to understand why no movement on the balance is forecast,particularly given the planned capital expenditure. 和管理层讨论 deferred tax provision为什么没有变化 -Obtain and review a forecast statement of changes in equity to ensure that movements in retained earnings appear reasonable.(Retained earnings are forecast to increase by $800,000,but the profit forecast for the period is $10.52 million -there must be other items taken through retained earnings such as a planned dividend.) 检查预测表中equity的变动，保证其合理性 Agree the movement in cash,and the forecast closing cash position to a cash flow forecast. 将 cash 的变动与CF forecast 核对 题号：AAA Mock exam Q2b 本题核心知识点：implication for assurance report 官方答案： 得分标准： (c) 解析 ： 解 Assurance report Generally 1 mark per point: Assumptions over revenue and profit on disposal will fundamentally affect the forecast statement of profit or loss,therefore the conclusion should be modified If the issue is considered material and pervasive an adverse conclusion should be given over the reasonableness of the assumptions If the issue is considered material but not pervasive a qualified conclusion should be given over the reasonableness of the assumptions A basis for qualified/adverse conclusion will explain the matters giving rise to the modified conclusion The report will contain an unmodified opinion stating that forecast financial statements have been prepared on the basis of the assumptions 4 4 Maximum Prnfecsinnal marke 背景解析： 见上题 Requirement解析： (c)Using the information in Exhibit 3,discuss the implications for the assurance report,assuming no revisions will be made to the forecast financial statements. (4 marks) 对鉴证报告的影响 案例和答案解析： (c) Assurance reporting implications Assumptions over revenue and profit on disposal will fundamentally affect the forecast statement of profit or loss,therefore the conclusion should be modified.应该 修改报告结论 If the issue is considered material and pervasive an adverse conclusion should be given over the reasonableness of the assumptions. The conclusion will state that the assumptions do not provide a reasonable basis for the forecast. 如果影响 是重大且广泛的，那么出具否定意见 If the issue is considered material but not pervasive a qualified conclusion should be given over the reasonableness of the assumptions. The conclusion will state that except for the assumptions over revenue and the profit on disposal,the assumptions provide a reasonable basis for the forecast. 如果影响是重大但不广泛，那么出具保 留意见 The basis for conclusion section will explain the matters giving rise to the modified conclusion and quantify the extent of the issue. This will be titled either a basis for qualified conclusion or basis for adverse conclusion depending on the type of conclusion issued. 需要添加解释段来解释问题的性质以及程度 The report will also contain an unmodified opinion stating that forecast financial statements have been prepared on the basis of the assumptions. 对于预测表是在 假设的基础上准备的这件事情审计师会出具无保留意见 题号：AAA Mock exam Q3 a 本题核心知识点： Audit evidence &maters to consider 官方答案： (a) Completion matters Generally up to 1 mark for each relevant point of discussion/action or further procedure: (1)Inventory (i)Sufficiency of evidence and further procedures Written representations do not provide sufficient appropriate audit evidence on their own but should be used to support other evidence Evidence is not sufficient,further audit procedures necessary to determine whether the potentially obsolete items can be recycled Further procedures: Physically inspect the items to see if some of the material could be recycled Enquire of relevant personnel whether the plastic coating is unsuitable for recycling by the company Consider if the items could be sold to another company Review invoices raised after the year end for evidence that the items have been sold to determine net realisable value (ii) Matters to be considered Inventory must be measured at the lower of cost and net realisable value therefore items should be written off unless they can be recycled for future use Adjustment of$130,000 required to inventory and cost of sales (2)Legal claim (i) Sufficiency of evidence and further procedures Evidence is not sufficient as verbal representation as source of evidence not reliable,written confirmation should be requested Lack of management integrity/management-imposed limitation of scope Further procedures: Review correspondence between the lawyers and WeddellCo for indications that the lawyers believe the amount is probable to be paid Review board minutes for evidence that the outcome of the legal claim has been discussed Discuss the matter with Weddell Co's legal department Review bank statements and cash book for post year end payment (ii) Matters to be considered A provision should be recognised where a present obligation gives rise to a probable outflow of economic benefit that can be measured reliably in accordance with IAS37 Adjustment of $125,000 required to provision liabilities and operating expenses (3)Director's loan (i) Sufficiency of evidence and further procedures The loan advanced to Mawson,the CFO,meets the definition of a related party transaction Formal loan agreement and external confirmation of loan payment not reviewed therefore evidence is not sufficient Further procedures: Review board minutes to confirm authorisation for the loan was given by the other directors Review the written terms of the loan to confirm terms and conditions Inspect WeddellCo's bank statement to confirm the payment of the loan (ii) Matters to be considered The director's loan is a related party transaction which requires disclosure of the nature of the related party relationship,the amount of the transaction and the amount outstanding in accordance with IAS 24 Maximum Marks 16 解 析 ： 背景解析： 3 WEDDELL It is 1 July 20X5.You are an audit manager in D'Urville &Co,and you have just been placed in charge of the audit of Weddell Co for the year ended 31 March 20X5 which is nearing completion.Weddell Co is a print supplier to businesses, printing catalogues,leaflets,training manuals and stationery to order.It specialises in using 100%recycled paper in its printing and sustainable packaging for its distribution,which is a key selling point and heavily promoted in its advertising. The manager previously assigned to the audit of Weddell Co has been moved to another urgent assignment,and you have been assigned to take on the manager's role for the remainder of the audit. Materiality has been set at $800,000 for assets and liabilities and $250,000 for income and expenses. The following exhibits,available on the left-hand side of the screen,provide information relevant to the question: 1.Completion matters-details regarding issues raised for your attention by the audit supervisor. 2.Update on completion matters -provides an update on the outcome of initial discussions with the client. This information should be used to answer the question requirements within the response option provided. 之前的审计经理被调取别的项目了，你刚刚接受这个审计项目，重要性水平是 $800,000 of assets 和$250,000 of income (a)Requirement解析： (a) Using the information in Exhibit 1: i.Comment on the sufficiency of evidence obtained and recommend any further audit procedures necessary. ii.Comment on the matters to be considered and explain any adjustments that may be necessary to the financial statements. (16 marks) i.评价审计证据是否充分，建议还能做哪些审计程序 ii. 讨论需要考虑的因素，对财报需要做哪些调整 案例和答案解析： 11 Exhibit 1-Completion matters The audit supervisor has brought the following matters to your attention: (1)Inventory Audit procedures performed at the inventory count indicated that printed inventory items with a cost of $130,000 were potentially obsolete. These items were mainly out of date training manuals.The inventory has not been written off as it is believed that the paper on which the items are printed can be recycled and used again in future printing orders.However,the items appear not to be recyclable as they are coated in plastic.The junior who performed the audit work on inventory has requested a written representation from management to confirm that the items can be recycled and no further procedures relevant to these items have been performed. 存货盘点是发现有$130,000的货物老旧了，但是并没有被兼职，因为管理层 认为还可以回收，但是应该是不能回收了。审计师获取了一份管理层声明书证明 可以被回收，便没有再做其他的审计程序了。 (2)Legal claim Weddell Co is involved in a court case with a competitor,Scotia Co,which alleges that a design used in Weddell Co's printed material is a copy of one of Scotia Co's designs which are protected under copyright. The only evidence lawyers that a claim of $125,000 has been made against Weddell Co,whichthe audit team has obtained is a verbal confirmation from Weddell Co's lawyers that a claim of $125,000 has been made against Weddell Co,which they believe is probable to be paid.Mawson Ross,the chief finance officer they believe is probable to be paid.Mawson Ross,the chief finance officer (CFO)has not recognised a provision in Weddell Co's financial statements. arguing that it is immaterial. Mawson refused our request to ask the lawyers to confirm their opinion on the matter in writing,saying it is not worth bothering the lawyers again on such a trivial matter. Weddell 公司被竞争对手起诉抄袭版权。审计师获取到的唯一证据就是Weddell 公司律师说很可能会赔偿$125,000,但是CFO 没有在财报中确认为provision, 并且拒绝让审计师获取到书面的声明。 (3)Director's loan Weddell Co made a loan of $6,000 to Mawson Ross in March 20X5.The amount is recognised as a current asset at fair value.The loan carries an interest rate of 4%which we have confirmed to be the market rate for equivalent to an arm's length transaction.Mawson has provided writtenshort -term loans and we have concluded that the loan is at terms equivalent to an arm's length transaction.Mawson has provided written confirmation that the loan will be repaid by 31 October 20X5.The only other confirmation that the loan will be repaid by 31 October 20X5.The only other audit work performed was to agree the cash payment to the cash book. Details of the loan have not been separately disclosed in the financial statements. Weddell 公司借了$6,000给CFO, 利率为4%。 CFO 提供了书面声明确认会在 20X5/10/31 还钱。审计程序只做了将付款与现金账核对，借款并没有单独披露。 (a) Completion matters (1)Inventory (i)Sufficiency of evidence and further procedures A written representation has been requested for this matter.According to ISA 580 Written Representations, written representations can provide necessary audit evidence,but they do not provide sufficient and appropriate audit evidence on their own about any of the matters with which they deal. Written representations should only be used to support other evidence obtained by the auditor. 管理层声明书不能当 作充分恰当的审计证据 The written representation is insufficient audit evidence,and further audit procedures are necessary to determine whether the potentially obsolete items are made from material that can be recycled. 需要做其他的审计程序来证明可以被回收 Further procedures: -Physically inspect the items to see if some of the material could be recycled (e.g. the covers may be coated with plastic but the pages may not be and therefore are recyclable). 实地检查是否可以被回收 -Enquire of relevant personnel such as a production manager whether the plastic coating is unsuitable for recycling by the company. 询问相关人员是否可以被回收 -Consider if the items could be sold to a company specialising in recycling plastic material,in which case the items would have a realisable value. 考虑存货是否可以 卖出 去 -Review any invoices raised after the year end for evidence that the items have been sold,to determine whether a net realisable value exists. 检查年后的发票确认是否有 可变现净值 (ii) Matters to be considered IAS 2 Inventories requires that items are measured at the lower of cost and net realisable value. If the items cannot be sold,the net realisable value is zero and the items should be written off unless they can be recycled for future use. The adjustment to write off the inventory would reduce inventory within current assets and increase cost of sales by $130,000,reducing profit.This is not material individually. 准则：存货要以cost和 NRV 孰低来计量 风险：如果不能回收，那么存货的NRV 就是0,但是公司并没有减值 影响：会导致inventory 和 profit 的减少，不重大 (2)Legal claim (i) Sufficiency of evidence and further procedures Audit evidence indicates that the amount is probable to be paid based on a verbal confirmation from Weddell Co's lawyers.According to ISA 500 Audit Evidence, audit evidence in documentary form,whether paper,electronic,or other medium,is more reliable than evidence obtained orally. We should therefore seek written confirmation from the lawyers on their opinion of whether the amount is probable to be paid. 口头证明不可靠，需要获取书面证明 The CFO has refused our request to ask the lawyers for a written confirmation.We should consider the integrity of management and why authority to seek written confirmation is being refused.It also constitutes a management -imposed imitation on scope. which could have consequences for the audit opinion if evidence cannot be obtained from other sources,or if the audit committee do not override the CFO and allow our request for written confirmation to go ahead.管理层 的诚实需要怀疑，并且是否有审计范围受限，需要修改审计意见的情况 Further procedures: -Review correspondence between the lawyers and Weddell Co for indications that the lawyers have stated in that correspondence their opinion on the outcome of the legal claim. 检查和律师之间的往来信函确定是否会赔钱 -Review board minutes for evidence that the outcome of the legal claim has been discussed. 检查董事会会议纪要 -Discuss the matter with any internal legal expert/legal department of Weddell Co. 和法律部门讨论此事 -Review post year end bank statements and cash book for any settlement paid in respect of the legal claim. 检查是否有期后付款 (ii)Matters to be considered A provision should be recognised where a present obligation gives rise to a probable outflow of economic benefits that can be measured reliably,according to IAS 37 Provisions,Contingent Liabilities and Contingent Assets. The adjustment to recognise a provision would increase provision liabilities within current liabilities and increase operating expenses by $125,000,reducing profit.This is not material individually. 准则：当公司因为过去发生的事项而导致有现时义务并且很可能会有经济利益 流出的时候需要确认预计负债 影响：公司需要确认预计负债，会导致provision liability和 operating expense的 增 加，错报不重大 (3)Director's loan (i) Sufficiency of evidence and further procedures The loan advanced to Mawson meets the definition of a related party transaction,as the CFO is a member of key management personnel,and as such is a related party of Weddell Co.This is material by nature. 关联方交易， 本质是重大的 The only evidence obtained is from the CFO,and the company's cash book.Formal written agreement for the loan containing the specific terms and conditions has not been confirmed and external evidence confirming the loan payment has not been obtained.Therefore,the audit evidence on file is not sufficient. 审计证据不足，还需要获取到借款协议，检查里面的条款 Further recommended procedures: · Review board minutes to confirm authorisation for the loan was given by the other directors. 检查董事会会议纪要确认借款是有授权的 · Review the written terms of the loan to confirm an interest rate of 4% and to review for any other terms and conditions. 检查借款条款，确认利率 · Inspect Weddell Co's bank statement to confirm the payment of the loan to Mawson. 检查Weddell 公司的银行对帐单，确认有借款给 CFO (ii)Matters to be considered According to IAS 24 Related Party Disclosures,disclosure is required in the notes to the financial statements of: -the nature of the related party relationship -the amount of the transaction -the terms and conditions and whether the balance is secured - the amount outstanding at the year end. If this disclosure is not provided,the financial statements will be materially misstated. 准 则：关联方交易要求进行详细披露 影响：如果没有披露，那么财报将有重大错报 题号：AAA Mock exam Q3b 本题核心知识点： Auditor's report 官方答案： 得分标准： (b) Impact on the auditor's report Generally up to 1 mark for each point discussed: Misstatements in relation to inventory and the legal claim are individually not material but are material in aggregate.Adjustment of $255,000 is material by size Related party disclosure is material by nature therefore must be adjusted to avoid a modified opinion Modified opinion due to material misstatement Material but not pervasive as adjustment only just exceeds materiality threshold Qualified opinion with except for wording Basis for qualified opinion will explain and quantify the misstatements Maximum 解析： 背景解析： Exhibit 2-Update on completion matters following discussions with management It is now 1 September 20X5 and the auditor's report on Weddell Co's financial statements for the year ended 31 March 20X5 is due to be issued in the next few days. Following discussions with management,they have stated that they are not willing to make any further adjustments to the financial statements in relation to the issues outlined in Exhibit 1 and you are now considering the form and content of the auditor's report. Requirement解析： bs)ing the information in Exhibit 2,discuss the implications for the auditor's report on the basis that no further adjustments have been made to the financial statements in relation to the matters discussed in requirement (a).(4 marks) 如果上述更改没有调整，对审计报告的影响 案例和答案解析： (b)Implications for the auditor's report Summary of potential adjustments to the financial statements Summary of potential adjustments to the financial statements (1) (2) Inventory Cost of sales Inventories Legal claim Operating expenses Provisions Statement of profit or loss Debit Credit S000 $000 Statement of financial position Debit Credit $000 $000 130 130 125 255 The adjustments in relation to inventory and the legal claim are individually immaterial to profit and assets,however,in aggregate the reduction in profit of $255,000 is material by size to the financial statements. 存货和官司单独看来是不重 大的，但是合并在一起就是重大的 The related party disclosure in relation to the director's loan is individually material as it is material by nature.Disclosure must therefore be made to avoid a modified opinion. 关联方交易披露本身就是性质重大的 Management are not willing to make any further adjustments and so the opinion should be modified due to material misstatement.如果管理层不修改，审计师会因为 重大错报而修改意见 The aggregate effect of the misstatements is unlikely to be considered pervasive as the required adjustment only just exceeds the materiality threshold of $250,000 and the missing disclosure is limited to one area therefore not fundamental to the user's understanding . 对与财报的影响是不广泛的 In these circumstances the auditor should issue a qualified audit opinion stating that except for'these matters the financial statements are fairly presented.所 以 审 计 师 会出具保留意见，并以‘except for’的 形 式 来 表 达 The Basis for Opinion paragraph should be changed to a Basis for Qualified Opinion paragraph.This should describe and quantify the financial effects of the misstatements and the impact on the disclosures. 意见段后面要添加解释段，解释对 财报数字和披露的影响 题号：2022 Sep Qla 本题核心知识点： Business risk 官方答案： 得分标准： 1 (a)Business risk evaluation Up to 2 marks for each business risk (unless indicated otherwise).Marks may be awarded for other,relevant business risks not included in the marking guide. In addition,/2 mark for relevant trends or calculations which form part of the evaluation of business risk (max 3 marks across the whole question). - Damage to operations-warehouse fire - Investment in Luxury Pet Supplies Co Loan finance Eco-friendly delivery vans Legal case Cyber attack Perishable products Maximum marks Marks 10 解 析 ： 题干解析： It is 1 July 20X5.You are a manager in the audit department of Quince &Co,a firm of Chartered Certified Accountants, and you are responsible for the audit of Winberry Co,a listed entity and an existing client ofyour firm.The company has a financial year ending 30 September 20X5,and you are about to start planning this year's audit. 1.Partner's email-an email which you have received from Olivia Fig,the audit engagement partner. 2.Meeting notes -notes of a meeting which Olivia Fig recently attended with the audit committee of Winberry Co focusing on understanding the current operation and future strategy of the business. 3.Financial information -selected financial information from Winberry Co's management accounts. 4.Internet search -the headline results from an internet search performed by the audit team about the business and industry. This information should be used to answer the question requirement within your chosen response option(s) ONLINE DELIVERY-F To: Audit manager From: Olivia Fig,Audit engagement partner Subject: Winberry Co audit planning Date: 1 July 20X5 Hello I attended a planning meeting last week with the finance director and a representative of the audit committee of Winberry Co,at which we discussed business developments during the year and plans for thefuture.I have provided you with my notes from this meeting,as well as some background information about the company from the permanent audit file. Based on the analysis I have done on this industry,it is appropriate for overall materiality to be based on profit before tax as this is a key focus for investors and providers of finance. 被审计单位 Winberry Co, 上市公司，年底时间30/9/20X5,materiality 根据PBT 算。 Requirement解析： Using the information provided in all the exhibits,I require you to prepare briefing notes for my own use,in which you: (a) Evaluate the significant business risks facing the company.(10 marks) 本题要求找出business risk,标准分一点2分，所以应写5点左右 案例和答案解析： Winberry Co is a listed company operating as a retailer in the online grocery market with coverage of75%of the country. The company has a loyal and growing customer base who place orders via either the company's website or an application (app)which can be installed on a customer's mobile phone.Winberry Co fulfils grocery orders,delivering to customers' homes via a fleet of company-owned refrigerated delivery vehicles.Winberry Co prides itself on having a market-leading inventory system which ensures that customers can only order groceries which are currently available.This helps Winberry Co's customers avoid the inconvenience of ordering unavailable items. A significant proportion of the groceries supplied by Winberry Co are 8.perishable products,the sale and storage of which is highly regulated through food safety regulations.Winberry Co employs experienced food and product technology professionals to ensure that the company complies with all food safety legislation. The directors of Winberry Co are pursuing ambitious expansion plans in order to establish a strong position in the home delivery grocery market and to explore business partnerships in associated markets. International expansion 1.Winberry Co is planning to expand into the foreign country ofFarland by setting up operations similar to its existing business.Farland uses the same currency as Winberry Co's existing operations.4.The investment is expected to cost $125 million.Winberry Co does not currently have the funds for this expansion itself but is in advanced negotiations with its current bankers,who are keen to provide loan financing on the same basis and covenant as the existing loan finance.The expansion is expected to occur in 20X6. Data protection issue Two months ago,Winberry Co suffered a 2.cyber-security attack in which the personal information of2,500 customers, including their credit card details,was stolen. 13.According to a representative of the audit committee,the company's internal audit team had not properly assessed the risks relating to cyber-security,which is a requirement of data protection legislation in the jurisdiction in which Winberry Co operates.The issue which led to the cyber-security attack has now been resolved.Winberry Co did not make any reports of the breach to regulators.
