(14 marks) 讨论为什么inventory 存在重大错报风险， 一 点 一 分。针对inventory 的审计程序， 一 点 一 分，共14分。 案例解析： Exhibit 3见上题 Exhibit 4 inventory 7 Isabella Phoenix,the audit engagement partner,thinks that based on her initial review,inventory gives rise to a significant risk of material misstatement.She would like you tojustify this, because the briefing notes will be used to explain the audit approach to the audit team,and to recommend relevant audit procedures in response to the specific risks identified. Information extracted from the latest management accounts in respect of inventory is given below: Note Actual at 30 June 20X5 $'000 Actual at 30 September 20X4 $'000 Raw material 1 24 16 Work in progress 2 533 484 Finished good 3 80 44 Total 637 544 1.Raw materials The company tries to minimise the amount ofraw materials stored at its premises but to take advantage of a discount offered on a bulk purchase firom a supplier,a large quantity ofaluminum was purchased in June 20X5. 2.Work in progress The direct costs relating to each contract are recorded in thejob costing system.Raw materials relevant for each contract are input as they are used,and payroll costs are input manually using time sheets which records the hours spent by different engineers working on each contract.The direct costs are used as the basis for adding production overheads,which are included at 10%of the direct costs.The company's finance director estimates the percentage completion of each contract at the financial year end. 3.Finished goods Currently, one boat,which has received its licence to sail,is being stored at the company’s premises as the customer cannot take delivery until October 20X5.A second boat is awaiting a second safety inspection,having failed the first inspection due to faulty safety equipment being installed. 答案解析： Justification In total,the inventories balance has increased by 17%,and the balance in total is highly material to the financial statements. The individual categories of work in progress and finished goods are material in their own right. 讨论materiality1 分 Raw materials have increased by 50%,and this increase has been explained by a recent bulk purchase,which seems to be a reasonable explanation,though it should be corroborated by audit procedures. 讨论raw material的变动1分。 Work in progress has increased by 10·0%,which seems high when compared with an increase in revenue of 5·4%.Estimating the value of work in progress is complicated and involves the use of management judgement.The fact that Gavin Bee is a new finance director elevates this risk as he may be unfamiliar with the methods used to value work in progress relating to boats, leading to inappropriate estimates of valuation being made.He may also take a different approach to that used previously, resulting in a lack of consistency in how work in progress is valued. In addition,internal control deficiencies were found by the new finance director which means that costs may not be properly allocated to contracts and the manual inputting of data gives rise to a high risk of error.The allocation of overneads on a percentage basis may not be an accurate reflection of the actual production costs incurred.In addition,there may be some contracts which are incurring higher than anticipated costs,and could be loss-making,in which case a provision should be recognised. No information has been provided by the client regarding how management evaluates the profitability of contracts and there is a risk that the process is not happening at all,or that the process is not robust enough to identify potentially loss-making contracts. work in progress的变动不合理，1分。 new finance director针对work in progress做出的完工百分比判断可能不合理，1分。 内控缺陷可能导致work in progress 计量错误，1分。 Allocation of overheads可能不合理，1分。 Work in progress中可能存在亏损合同，1分。 For the finished goods,the boat which is being stored for a customer should not be included in inventory if the company has completed its contractual obligation.The boat has received its licence to sail but has not yet been delivered to the customer. If Encore Co has fufilled its contractual obligations,a sale should be recognised and the boat derecognised from inventory. Storing the boat for several months before the customer can take delivery is not a valid reason to continue to recognise the boat as inventory. The boat which has not passed its safety inspection could be overvalued if Encore Co has to incur further costs to ensure that the boat passes the inspection.IAS 2 Inventories requires inventories to be valued at the lower of cost and net realisable value, and it is possible that further costs could reduce the net realisable value of the boat to below its cost,in which case a reduction in value should be recognised. the boat which is being stored for a customer 不应该作为inventory 处理，1分。 The boat which has not passed its safety inspection可能存在高估，1分。 Procedures For the raw materials: - Agree a sample of items included in raw materials to supplier invoice and purchase order placed with the supplier to confirm the cost of the items and their existence. - Obtain and review the bulk purchase discount offered by the supplier and agree that specific transaction to cash book and bank statement and to goods received notes and trace into the inventory system. -选取原材料样本，检查采购发票以及订单，确认原材料成本准确性以及存在性。1分 -检查原材料大批量采购折扣，核对该交易至现金日记账，银行对账单以及收货单，核对 至存货系统。1分 For the work in progress: For the contracts included in work in progress,agree a sample of direct costs to supporting documentation,e.g.raw materials to suppler invoices,payroll costs to timesheets and payroll records. The internal controls falling under the scope ofthis review are not all directly related to the financial reporting process. Second,the company has recently applied to their bank for additional finance of $60,000 to be used n the joint arrangement with Elm Associates.Gavin Bee has asked whether Garrick &Co can provide a guarantee for this finance. 答案解析： The finance director is correct that internal controls will be evaluated as part of the audit,but he is requesting an aditional service.Therefore,it should be arranged as an engagement separate to the audit,with a separate engagement letter detailing the scope of the work which is required.There should be a fee separate to the audit fee;the separate review of internal controls should not be included within the audit fee. 判断the additional service属于separate engagement with separate fee 。1分 判断service requested is an internal audit service 。1分 The IESBA International Code of Ethics for Professional Accountants (the Code)suggests that providing this type of work for an audit client,as an engagement separate from the audit,could be considered as providing an internal audit service.The Code states that internal audit services involve assisting the client in the monitoring of internal controls by reviewing controls, monitoring their operation and recommending improvements to them. Reviewing the internal controls of an audit client which are relevant to the financial reporting system would create a self-review threat as the auditor would consequently assess the effectiveness of the control system during the external audit.It is possible that the audit team may use the results of the internal audit service for the purposes of the audit without appropriately evaluating the results or exercising an appropriate leve of professional scepticism. 识别属于self-review及恰当解释。1分 11 Code规定。1分 To safeguard the self-review threat,professionals who are not members of the audit team should perform the review of internal controls. Company information Slaindar Co,a non-listed company,operates 20 coffee shops within large airport terminals.The company is owned and managed by Aaron Slaindar and a financial controller.Typically,Aaron takes a small salary from the company and extracts most of his income from the business in the form of dividends. Note:You have already performed the necessary client identification procedures.(12 marks) 在接受Slaindar 公司作为事务所的客户之前，评估G事务所应考虑的质量管理问 题。 题号：2023-3/6-Q2-(a) 本题核心知识点： matters to be considered before acceptance 得分标准： 2 (a) Client acceptance Generally,up to 1 mark per point evaluated: ISQM1 criteria Client integrity 0 Remaining elements of customer due diligence 0 Reason for non-appointment of existing auditor 0 Risk arising from lack of existing knowledge 0 Permission to contact existing auditor 0 Potential misrepresentation of the brand value to the bank 0 Planned under disclosure to bank suggests lack of integrity 0 Manipulation risk Competence and resources re short deadline Ethical issues 0 independence considered 0 self-interest threat audit 0 sef-interest threat hospitality 0 conflicts of interest 0 advocacy threat 0 safeguards Conclusion Maximum marks NLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 12 答案解析： Suggested answer:(a) Client acceptance When determining whether to enter into a professional relationship with a new client, an assurance firm is required to assess whether this would be possible under the criteria of ISQM1 Quality Management for Firms that Perform Audits or Reviews of Financial Statements or Other Assurance or Related Service Engagements.This means Gloop&Co shall make professional judgements based on the following quality objectives regarding whether to accept the engagement: -Information obtained about the nature and circumstances of the engagement; -Consideration of the integrity and ethical values of the client;and -The firm's ability to perform the engagement in accordance with professional standards and applicable legal and regulatory requirements. In addition to these acceptance judgements,Gloop &Co should also ensure they are following the IESBA International Code of Ethics for Professional Accountants (the Code). 在确定是否接这个业务之前，事务所需要考虑如下几个方面： 16 -已获得的有关该业务的性质和情况的信息； -考虑到客户的诚信和道德价值观； -事务所按照专业标准和适用的法律和法规要求执行业务的能力。 除了这些接受判断外， G 事务所还应确保它们遵守了IESBA 国际职业会计师道德 准则。 Integrity and ethical values of the client Gloop &Co has already performed client identification procedures,however,they will still be required to perform other elements of customer due diligence such as considering the business reputation of Slaindar Co's principal owners,key management,and those charged with governance.Consideration should be made by the audit team regarding whether there are any indications that the client might be involved in money laundering or other criminal activities. Gloop &Co已经执行了客户识别程序，但是，他们仍然需要执行客户尽职调查的 其他要素，比如考虑Slaindar公司的主要所有者、关键管理人员和那些负责治理 的人的商业声誉。审计小组应考虑是否存在任何迹象表明该客户可能参与洗钱 或其他犯罪活动。 The firm will also need to consider management's reasons for appointing a different firm from its auditors and the potential for management bias in the preparation of the cash flow forecast in support of the application for finance.It is possible that approaching Gloop&Co to perform this assignment and potentially the audit in future is an intimidation threat to the existing auditors whereby they act in accordance with the client demands to avoid a loss of income.ISQM1 suggests the firm should consider the reason for not using the existing auditors when assessing the integrity and ethical values of the client. 该会计师事务所还需要考虑管理层任命不同于审计师的事务所的原因，以及在 地质疑编制预测表背后的关键假设。当专业会计师被要求为非审计客户执行工 17 作时，客户应允许他们联系其审计人员以获取相关信息。如果未给予此许可， 则应拒绝该任命。 In addition,Gloop &Co should consider the attitude of the client and the risk of bias.The proposal by Aaron that funds work in the time scale required.This might impact on the quality of the engagement which can be performed.Where this is the case,Gloop &Co should not accept the engagement. 作为一家提供审计和相关服务的公司， G 事务所的员工应该有适当的能力来执行 对现金流预测的鉴证业务。然而，截止日是20X5日9月30日，这么近的截止日期 可能会导致G事务所抽不出员工去提供该服务，也没有足够多的时候去获取充分 适当的证据。这可能会影响执行业务的质量。在这种情况下， G 事务所也不应接 受该约定。 Ethical issues 18 Given that Slaindar Co is not currently a client of Gloop&Co,the firm's independence from Slaindar Co will not have been previously considered.In this regard,it is important to ensure there are no threats to the firm's objectivity which might prevent it from accepting the appointment.If the firm is not independent and its objectivity is compromised,the reliability of the assurance report will be undermined. 鉴于S 公司目前不是G 事务所的客户，该事务所的独立性过去从来没有考虑过。 确保不存在一些影响事务所客观性的威胁对于接不接这项业务是很重要的。如 果事务所不是独立的，其客观性受到损害，保证报告的可靠性将受到破坏。 It appears Aaron is encouraging Gloop&Co to accept the review engagement by offering the audit appointment as an incentive,on the assumption that the outcome of the loan application is successful.This creates a self-interest threat in that Gloop &Co has a financial interest in accepting Slaindar Co as a client in performing the review engagement to secure a future appointment as the company's auditor. Aaron似乎是在鼓励G 事务所接受审阅委托，通过提供审计业务作为激励，而且 是在贷款申请的结果是成功的前提条件下。这造成了一种自身利益的威胁，因 为G 事务所接受S公司作为客户，以执行审阅业务，以确保未来被任命为该公司 的审计师。 There is an additional self-interest threat arising from the offer of free food and beverages for life.The Code prohibits the acceptance of hospitality unless the value is trivial,and the offer does not constitute an inducement toward a particular outcome. Here,the offer has been made as an inducement to ensure a positive assurance review and the value over a lifetime is likely to be significant,so this cannot be accepted.The inducement could be construed as a bribe and an indicator that Aaron's integrity is in doubt. 提供免费的终身食物和饮料还会带来额外的自身利益的威胁，职业道德禁止接 受客户的款待，除非其价值微不足道，且要约不构成对特定结果的诱因。在这 里，公司给到事务所的邀约是一个诱因，说你给我好的审阅意见，那么我将来 公司的审计业务就给你做，而且提供终身的食物和饮料，这个终身的价值可能 是很重大的，所以这不能被接受。这种诱因可以被解释为一种贿赂，并表明 Aaron的正直受到怀疑。 An advocacy threat is also created because Gloop &Co has anincentive to promote the financial interests of Slaindar Co to the bank to ensure the loan will be provided,and this may impact the quality and objectivity of the review engagement. Gloop&Co should consider whether any safeguards can be implemented to reduce any ethical threats to an acceptable level,for example,using an independent second partner to review the work performed for the review engagement.If safeguards do not reduce the threats to an acceptable level,then the review engagement should not be performed. 由于G 事务所有动机向银行推荐S公司的财务利益，以确保提供贷款，因此也产 生了过度推介威胁，这可能会影响审阅业务的质量和客观性。G事务所应考虑是 否可以实施任何解决措施，将任何道德威胁降低到可接受的水平，例如，使用 独立的合伙人来复核审阅工作结果。如果解决措施没有将威胁降低到一个可接 受的水平，那么就不应执行审阅工作。 19 Gloop &Co should also consider whether there are any conflicts of interest between Slaindar Co and any of the firm's existing clients.Where any such conflicts exist,Gloop &Co would be required to notify both Slaindar Co and the existing client explaining the situation and proposed safeguards which will be implemented to mitigate the risk.Permission in writing will be required from both parties to proceed with the engagement. G事务所还应考虑S公司与咱们事务所的任何现有客户之间是否存在任何利益冲 突。如果存在任何此类冲突， G 事务所必须同时通知S公司和现有客户，通过解 释情况和拟实施的减轻风险的保障措施。双方需要书面许可。 Conclusion Given the issues with respect to client integrity and the high risk arising from bank reliance,it is likely Gloop&Co would choose to reject the assurance work. 考虑到客户诚信方面的问题和银行依赖所产生的高风险， G 事务所很可能会选择 拒绝审阅业务。 It is now 1 August 20X5 and Aaron has retired without withdrawing a lump sum and instead will continue to receive dividends as retirement income.On this basis,and having satisfied client acceptance procedures,Gloop&Co have accepted the engagement to review the cash flow forecast for the $500,000 expansion funding. The finance controller has prepared a cash flow forecast for submission to the bank. The cash flow forecast covers the three years to 30 June 20X8. The finance controller is an experienced qualified accountant and his forecasting in prior years has been very accurate. 现在是20X5 年8月日1日，Aaron 已经退休，没有一次性提取一笔款项，而将继续 领取股息作为退休收入。在此基础上，为了满足接受客户的程序， G 事务所已 经接受了审阅现金流预测表的业务，关于公司扩张需要用到的50万美元。财务 总监已编制了为了提交给银行的现金流预测表。现金流预测表涵盖截至20X8 年6 月30日的三年数据。财务总监是一位经验丰富的有资质的会计师，他在前几年 的预测一直非常准确。 Requirement: (b)Evaluate the assumptions used by management and the completeness of the cash flow forecast prepared,explaining why particular assumptions should be challenged and approached with professional scepticism.(8 marks) Professional marks will be awarded for the demonstration of skill in analysis and evaluation,professional scepticism and judgement,and commercial acumen in your answer.(5 marks) 评估管理层所使用的假设和所准备好的现金流预测表的完整性，解释为什么特 定的假设应该受到质疑，并以专业人士的职业怀疑态度来处理。 ( 8 分 ) 题号：2023-3/6-Q2(b) 本题核心知识点：对现金预测表当中数据所用到的假设的职业怀疑 得分标准： 20 (b) Generally,1 mark for each valid point of evaluation and/2 mark for each relevant trend or calculation point discussed to a maximum of 3 marks. Examples include: 一 Sales 0 20X3 levels may not return immediately 0 Sales price inflation 0 Revenue per restaurant 0 Assumes fulincome from start of the period opened Supplier payments 0 Gross profit appears high 0 Assumes six months credit 一 Lease payments 0 New leases costs Other costs 0 No cost inflation included 0 Apparently no pay rises Capital expenditure 0 No capital expenditure for existing restaurants Marketing costs 0 Appear low 0 Single period only Loan repayments omitted Loan interest on new loan omtted Tax omitted Professional sklls marks Analysis and evaluation Evaluation of the available evidence by the identification of further specific sources of information in order to validate and corroborate assumptions and estimations made in the forecast by the client Professional scepticism and professional judgement Effective challenge and critical assessment of the acceptance considerations supplied with appropriate conclusions Demonstration of evaluation of the forecast and identification of the areas where professional scepticism should be applied Commercial acumen 525一 Appropriate recognition of the wider implications on the engagement,the audit firm and the company Maximum marks 5 25 Maximum 答案解析： Suggested answer: (b) Sales Assumptions with respect to sales appear to be very optimistic.There is no guarantee that levels of sales at each coffee shop will return to the pre-downturn values as rapidly as forecast.New coffee shops appear to be expected to generate the same level of sales from the beginning of the period in which they are set up.This is unlikely for two reasons:first,the coffee shops are unlikely to be open for the full six months and will take time to become successful and established operations.Second,these coffee shops are in smaller airports which are unlikely to have the same level of footfall as the coffee shops in larger airports. 关于销售的假设似乎非常乐观。这并不能保证每个咖啡店的销售水平会像预期 的那样迅速地恢复到经济低迷前的水平。新的咖啡店似乎也会产生同样的水平 从他们成立的时期开始的销售。这不太可能发生，有两个原因：第一，咖啡店 不太可能开放整整6个月，需要时间才能获得成功和成熟的运营。其次，这些咖 啡店位于较小的机场，不太可能与较大机场的咖啡店的客流量相同。 This means a lower level of sales would be expected from the newly opened shops. 21 这意味着预计新开的商店的销售额将会下降。 The sales figure per coffee shop included by management appears to show growth of 28%over the period of the forecast.As the figures are all based on average sales levels per restaurant in 20X3,growth in sales is expected to increase only by price inflation. Although the level of inflation expected in the first 12 months of the forecast has been assumed by the preparer,the growth in sales per restaurant from year ending 30 June 20X6 to the year ending 30 June 20X8 is 28%which appears questionable.Based on 10%inflation per annum,this is expected to be 21%over two-year period.At 10% p.a.,sale price inflation already appears to be unrealistic and as such,revenues are likely to be overstated. 管理层计入的每家咖啡店的销售额似乎在预测期间增长了28%。由于这些数据 都是基于每家餐厅20X3 年的平均销售水平，预计销售额的增长只会因为价格上 涨而增长。虽然预测者假设了预测的前12个月的通胀水平，但从20X6年的6月30 日到20x8年6月30日每家餐厅的销售额增长了28%,这似乎值得怀疑。根据每年 10%的通货膨胀率，预计在两年内将达到21%。按每年10%的价格计算，销售价 格通胀似乎已经是不现实的，因此，收入很可能被夸大了。 Payments to suppliers Payments to suppliers assumes a gross margin of 70%,therefore costs of sales at 30%.This may be representative of historical levels but further information will be needed in order to determine if this is reasonable for this industry. 假设毛利率为70%,因此销售成本为30%。这可能代表了历史水平，但还需要进 一步的信息，以确定这对该行业是否合理。 Payments appear to be lagging sales by an entire six-month period.Such a credit period from suppliers is unlikely,especially given the current difficulties with the main supplier requesting cash on delivery. 付款似乎落后于销售整整6个月。供应商不太可能有这样的信贷期，特别是考虑 到目前主要供应商在交货时要求现金的困难。 Given the above,the timing of the cash flows to suppliers is likely to be incorrect and potentially also understated. 综上所述，现金流流向供应商的时机很可能是不正确的，而且也可能被低估了。 Lease payments Average lease costs for the existing 20 coffee shop locations are $51,250 for a six- month period giving a total cost each period of $1,025,000 as at the start of the forecast period.The lease cost of the 25 shops at the end of the forecast is $1,185,000 which,after removing the lease costs of the original coffee shops,gives lease costs of $160,000 for the five new shops.This gives a total value of lease costs for the new coffee shops at only $32,000 per location.This may be due to the locations,with smaller airports charging lower rentals or because Aaron has been able to use his contacts to negotiate low prices,however,these costs should be scrutinised carefully to ensure lease costs are not understated. 现有20家咖啡店在六个月期间的平均租赁成本为51250美元，在预测期间开始时， 每个期间的总成本为1025000美元。截至预测结束时，这25家店铺的租赁成本为 22 1185000美元在取消了原有咖啡店的租赁成本后，这五家新咖啡店的租赁成本 为16万美元。这使得新咖啡店的租赁成本总价值为每个地点只有3.2万美元。这 可能是由于这些地点，较小的机场收取较低的租金，或者因为Aaron已经能够利 用他的联系人来协商低价，然而，这些成本应该被仔细审查，以确保租赁成本 不会被低估。 Other costs including staff Other costs appear to represent a constant $25,000 per coffee shop for each six-month period.This is unrealistic as there are likely to be inflationary increases in costs and it is expected some staff would receive pay rises over the course of the next three years.This results in an understatement of costs. 其他费用似乎是每六个月期间每家咖啡店平均为25000美元。这是不现实的，因 为成本可能会出现通货膨胀的增加，而且预计一些工作人员将在未来三年内获 得加薪。这就导致了对成本的保守表述。 Capital expenditure Capital expenditure has been included for the new locations,however,no ongoing capital expenditure appears to be planned for the existing locations.It is likely some additional capital expenditure would be required for existing premises and therefore this figure should be higher and present in more than the two periods currently included. 新地点已包括在资本支出当中，但是，现有地点似乎没有计划持续的资本支出。 现有仓库很可能需要一些额外的资本支出，因此这一数字应更高，而且应超过 目前包括的两个期间。 Marketing The marketing costs appear to be very low at only $20,000.This may be because customers at airports have little choice available and competition is low,however,it is likely that even within an airport there is an element of choice,and some marketing is needed to attract customers to Slaindar Co's coffee shops. 营销成本似乎很低，只有2万美元。这可能是因为机场的顾客几乎别无选择，竞 争也很低，然而，即使在机场内也可能有选择，需要一些营销来吸引顾客到 Slaindar公司的咖啡店。 Marketing appears to only be planned for the six-month period to 31 December 20X6. It would be expected marketing costs would be recurring.It appears marketing outflows may be understated. 市场营销似乎只计划在6个月期间截止至20x6年12月31日。预计营销成本将会重 复出现。营销资金外流似乎被低估了。 Loans and interest The forecast assumes the bank will provide financing for the expansion and as such,it is reasonable to include the receipt of loan finance in the forecast.Loan repayments for the loan appear to have been omitted,with loan repayment outflows remaining constant,presumably relating to the opening loan position. 23 该预测假定该银行将为此次扩张提供融资，因此，在该预测中包括收到的贷款 融资是合理的。贷款的贷款偿还似乎被省略了，贷款偿现金流出还保持不变， 可能与期初的贷款状况有关。 There is also no increase in interest payments over the period.This is not in line with expectation as additional interest would arise on both the new loan and on the new leased properties.As such,interest is understated. 在此期间，利息支付也没有增加。这与预期不一致，因为新贷款和新租赁物业 都会产生额外的利息。因此，利息被低估了。 Tax There does not appear to be an outflow in the forecast for tax payments.This may be due to the company utilising losses experienced in the prior two years,however,this assumption should be further investigated to ensure tax payments are not understated. 在对所得税的预测中，似乎没有资金流出。这可能是由于该公司利用了前两年 经营产生的损失，然而，这一假设应该被进一步调查，以确保所得税不被低估。 Conclusion The forecast appears to be based on very optimistic assumptions which may be inappropriate in the current economic climate and has several omissions which should also be investigated. 该预测似乎是基于非常乐观的假设，这在当前的经济气候下可能是不合适的， 并有一些遗漏，也应该进行调查。 GOLDEN EDUCATION ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 24 题 号：2023 MJ Q3a(i) 本题核心知识点： Internal control deficiencies 官方答案： 得分标准： Marks 3 (a)(i)Deficiencies in internal control Generally,up to 1 mark for each relevant and well explained answer point: Controls over significant operating system changes appear to be deficient Deficiencies could lead to inaccurate tax and possible fines/penalties(implications of the control deficiencies) Could indicate more pervasive deficiencies in the general control environment(wider implications of the control deficiencies) Marketing director appears to have deliberately taken assets from the company Management fraud should always be reported to those charged with governance even if not material In both cases,recommendations for improving internal controls should be made Maximum marks 案例背景及题 目： Internal control matters The audit engagement partner has asked you to evaluate two matters which arose during the audit,and to consider the communication of these issues to management and those charged with governance of Violet Co,n accordance with ISA 265 Communicating Deficiencies in Internal Control to Those Charged With Governance and Management. 1.New payroll system Prior to September 20X4,the company had used two different payroll systems-one for workers who are paid hourly and a separate system for employees on a fixed salary.In September 20X4,a new payroll system was introduced which integrates and enhances the two systems.Audit procedures indicated that when the data was migrated to the new system,some problems occurred with data corruption and duplication.Further audit procedures indicated that this did not result in a material misstatement within the financial statements.

stem_zh: 2. Marketing director The marketing director left Violet Co n March 20X5.When testing capital expenditure, one of the audit team found that in the week before she left employment,the marketing director had taken delivery of a new laptop computer,which remains in her possession. No supporting documentation could be found for this purchase,but the financial controller had approved the capital expenditure.The laptop is included as an asset in the non-current asset register. Using Exhibit 1: (a)(i)Discuss and justify whether the two internal control matters should be included in your communication to Those Charged With Governance and Management of Violet Co in respect of deficiencies in internal control. (5 marks) 解释题目中存在的内控缺陷，并与治理层沟通，每点1分。
explanation_zh: Matters to be included in respect of deficiencies in internal control In each case,the auditor needs to use judgement to determine whether the deficiency in internal control which has been identified is significant enough to warrant disclosure.According to ISA 265 Communicating Deficiencies jn Internal Control to Those Charged with Governance and Management,the significance of a deficiency or a combination of deficiencies in internal control depends not only on whether a misstatement has actually occurred,but also on the likelihood that a misstatement could occur and the potential magnitude of the misstatement. New payroll system The audit procedures have identified a deficiency in that internal controls over systems changes have not been adequate.When a new system is introduced,there should be a range of controls to ensure that data transfer is complete and accurate.It is common that old and new systems operate in parallel for a period of time so that problems can be quickly identified and rectified.The system change was clearly not well planned or performed,and this could indicate a wider weakness in the general controls within the organisation. 本期出现了系统更迭，此时要新旧系统应当并行一段时间以避免数据出错。 It is likely that the payroll system generates figures which are material to the financial statements. Even though audit procedures have indicated that there is no related material misstatement,a lack of controls over payroll could result in errors in the calculation and payment of payroll taxes, which in turn could lead to fines or penalties if mistakes are made.This potential problem should be communicated,as well as recommendations for establishing the internal controls which should be in place when there are significant changes to accounting systems. 这里虽然目前没有发现错误，但是payroll科目比较重要，后续可能会影响到缴税问题，因 此需要重点关注。 Marketing director The marketing director acquired a new laptop computer immediately before leaving the company, and the laptop computer has not been returned to Violet Co.Even though the laptop computer is not a significant asset,it remains on the company's non-current asset register,and having been paid for by Violet Co,it should have been given back to the company.If the marketing director deliberately acquired the laptop computer using company funds but with no intention of reimbursing the company or returning the asset on leaving,this amounts to a theft of company assets,which appears to have been endorsed by the financial controller.The behaviour of the financial controller questions their integrity and its overall effect on the risk profile of the audit client. Also,the marketing director may still have access to the company's servers and remote access to the company's financial information and bank accounts.If this is the case,there may have been other acts of misappropriation,e.g.theft of cash from the company's bank account,with implications for the integrity of the financial statements. 这里属于侵吞资产，有舞弊的嫌疑，而且可能有更多的资产被侵占，应予以关注。 This matter should be communicated to management and those charged with governance despite the fact that the value of the laptop is not likely to be significant to the company or material to the financial statements.ISA265 identifies that the identification of management fraud,whether or not material,which was not prevented by the entity's internal control,is an indicator of a significant deficiency in internal controls which should be communicated. 舞弊是需要重点与管理层沟通的事项，即使这里的金额不重大，也应当及时沟通。 However,it is possible that the marketing director has reimbursed Violet Co,in which case the laptop should be removed from the non-current asset register. 题号：2023 MJ Q3a(ii) 本题核心知识点：communicate with TCWG 官方答案： 得分标准： 26 (ii)Matters to be reported to Those Charged With Governance Generally,up to 1 mark for each relevant and well explained answer point: - Significant delay caused by lack of information provided to the audit team - Implications for audit efficiency and audit fee - Controls over manual journals appear to be deficient - Discuss why the same issue arose last year and has not been resolved - Communicate potential impact on financial statements of change in accounting policy regarding revaluations - Communicate practica considerations of the change in accounting policy - Ethical threat to objectivity - Management threat if partner attends board meetings - Allowed to attend but not make decisions Maximum marks 7 案例背景及题目 ： File note prepared by the audit supervisor In addition,the audit engagement partner has asked you to review a file note prepared by the audit supervisor,and to consider the matters to be reported in accordance with ISA 260 Com munication with Those Charged with Governance.

stem_zh: 1. Availability of information and manual journals The information provided by Violet Co's finance director at the start of the final audit did not support a number of material balances in the draft financial statements.As a result, a number of requests for additional information had to be made,which prolonged the duration of the audit. Even when additional information had been provided,the audit team found t difficult to agree the draft financial statements to the trial balance and general ledger because of several manual journal entries which had been made.Significant additional audit testing was undertaken as a result.Similar problems in confirming manual journal entries had been noted in the previous year and were discussed with the audit committee. Property valuation Violet Co currently adopts an accounting policy of recognising properties at cost.During the audit of non-current assets,the audit team was informed that the company is considering a change of accounting policy in the next financial year so that properties would be recognised at fair value from 1 August 20X5. Board meetings In a discussion with the audit manager,Violet Co's finance director said that he would like the audit engagement partner to attend the company's board meetings on a monthly basis so that he is aware of any issues which may impact on the external audit. (a)(ii)Using the file note prepared by the audit supervisor recommend the matters to be included in your report to Those Charged With Governance of Violet Co,and explain the reason for their inclusion. (7 marks) 本题考察了与治理层沟通时需要包含的内容，注意要结合题目进行分析，每点1分。 解 析 ： Matters to be communicated to those charged with governance Delays in providing information to the audit team Those charged with governance should be made aware of the delay which the audit team encountered in receiving important information.According to ISA260 Communication with Those Charged with Governance,significant delays by management,the unavailability of entity personnel,or an unwillingness by management to provide information necessary for the auditor to 27 perform the auditor's procedures represent significant difficulties encountered during the audit, which should be communicated. 管理层提供信息不准确且有问题，导致审计过程中遇见较大困难，审计时间被延长，此事 应当与治理层进行沟通。 The information underpinning the trial balance should have been prepared by the finance director and made available to the audit team but it had not been prepared as requested.The information was eventually received,but the delay will have meant that the audit did not run as efficiently as planned.The extra work may have implications for the audit fee,which should also be discussed. 在此基础上，由于审计时间延长，可能出现审计费需要增加的情况，此事也需要与治理层 沟 通 。 Controls over manual journals There appears to be control deficiencies or simply a lack of documentation over manual journals. Crawley &Co should recommend that controls are strengthened over the posting ot manual journals,to both reduce the risk of material misstatement in the financial statements and to avoid additional audit work being necessary next year. 在手工账的控制上有问题，应当加强此方面的控制。 It is particularly concerning that the same issue arose last year.Crawley &Co should raise the issue with those charged with governance in order to understand why last year's discussion has not been acted upon. 而且这属于一个持续的事件(去年也有发生),因此应该与治理层讨论，为什么这部分的 控制缺陷没有改善。 Change in accounting policy This planned change in accounting policy could have a significant impact on the company's financial statements. ISA 260 suggests that communication with those charged with governance may include a discussion of the qualitative aspects ofaccounting practices,including any changes in significant accounting policies.Crawley &Co may wish to explain in their communication the potential impact on the financial statements if such a policy were adopted.Crawley &Co should consider if Violet Co has a motivation to include properties at fair value in order to present the statement of financial position in a more favourable light. The audit firm may also comment on the key aspects of the accounting policy,for example,the ways in which fair value can be established,and the need for monitoring movements in fair value so that subsequent revaluation gains and losses can be properly identified and accounted for. In addition,Crawley &Co may also wish to discuss the practical implications ofthis policy,such as the cost of external valuations.The audit firm could also discuss the changes which may be needed in the audit approach for properties,when the policy is implemented in the next financial year. 与治理层讨论为什么会计政策出现了变更，以及这一变更对实际操作和做账的影响。 Board meetings Those charged with governance should be made aware of the finance director's request for the audit engagement partner to attend monthly board meetings.There is nothing to prohibit an auditor from simply attending the board meetings of an audit client as an observer There may be circumstances in which a representative from the audit firm needs to attend,for example,in order to inform those charged with governance of significant issues affecting auditor independence. 28 However,the auditor attending the clients board meeting must be careful that they take no part in any management decisions made at the meeting.If matters not relevant to the audit are debated on which the auditor's opinion is sought,the auditor could be deemed to be involved with management decisions,or to be providing an additional service to the client which potentially creates a threat to objectivity. The IESBA International Code of Ethics for Professional Accountants states that if an auditor serves as a director or officer of an audit client,the self-review and self-interest threats created would be so significant that no safeguards could reduce the threats to an acceptable level. Accordingly,no partner or employee should be appointed to the board of an audit client. 虽然审计师可以参加董事会的会议，但是这可能会对审计师的独立性造成威胁，审计师应 当注意不要承担管理层的责任，在会议中不要帮助管理层做任何决策。 These points should be explained to those charged with governance so that they understand why it was inappropriate for the finance director to make this request,and why the audit firm should decline. 题号：2023 MJQ3b 本题核心知识点：KAM 官方答案： 得分标准： (b)Key audit matters Up to 1 mark for each valid answer point which is a critique of the draft key audit matters paragraph: - Going concern matters should be in separate paragraph and are not a KAM Description too vague and should refer to cash flow problems not losses Should refer to the note to the financia statements,not the operating and financial review 一 Inappropriate to express an opinion on the level of support offered by the parent company - Contract win needs to have more explanation/discussion as to why it has been included as a KAM - Or,if not a KAM,it should not be included - Contradiction where the contract is described as eliminating going concern problems - KAM should not be used to provide additional opinion Inappropriate to refer to the details of the win or to name the competitor Maximum marks 8 案例背景及题目： ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 29 The audit work for Branson Co is complete and the auditor's report is due to be published next week.From reviewing the audit working papers,you are aware that Branson Co is facing some cash flow problems.A letter of support has been obtained from its parent company,Grantham Co. The audit working papers conclude that there is a significant doubt over the company's going concern,and that the financial statements of Grantham Co have been reviewed to confirm its financial status and ability to support Branson Co. The notes to the financial statements describe the cash flow problems faced by Branson Co,and the support offered by Grantham Co.The audit working papers conclude that the disclosures made in the financial statements are complete and appropriate.A draft of the key audit matters (KAM)section of the auditor's report in respect of Branson Co is shown below: Key audit matters(extract) Going concern We draw your attention to the going concern problems facing Branson Co.The company is loss making for the third consecutive year,and the going concern problems are fully described in the operating and financial review,which accompanies these financial statements.We are confident that the parent company,Grantham Co,is able to fully support Branson Co. Contract win On a more positive note,we are pleased to announce that Branson Co has recently been successful in tendering for a significant new contract to supply Talbot Co with pharmaceutical goods.The tendering process was very competitive,and the management team of Branson Co was pleased to win the contract from Rose Co,a key competitor.We believe that this will return Branson Co to profitability next year,and eliminates the going concern problems to a large extent. (b)Critically appraise the key audit matters(KAM)extract from the auditor's report on the financial statements of Branson Co for the year ended 31 May 20X5. (8 marks)Note:You are NOT required to re-draft the extract from the auditor's report. (8 marks) 本题考察的是审计报告中KAM 的使用情形以及内容。
explanation_zh: Branson Co-critique of auditor's report of going concern There is a significant uncertainty over going concern,and the issue should not be included in key audit matters(KAM). Instead,it should be disclosed in a separate section of the auditor's report entitled Material uncertainty related to going concern(MURGC)in accordance with ISA570 Going Concern.This is only appropriate if the audit team has sufficient,appropriate audit evidence to reach the conclusion that there is significant doubt over going concern,which has been adequately disclosed in the financial statements in accordance with IAS 1 Presentation of Financial Statements which is the situation in this scenario. The description of the company's loss making status is too vague and from the audit evidence it seems that the company's cash flow problems are the reason for its going concern problems,so it would be more appropriate to mention cash flow problems rather than losses in the MURGC paragraph. There is reference to where the going concern problems are discussed in the company's operating and financial review.The auditor's report should refer to the notes to the financial statements,as these are the disclosures required by the financial reporting framework and the disclosures which have been subject to audit. Finally,the auditor's statement that 'we are confident that the parent company,Grantham Co,is able to fully support Branson Co'is not appropriate.The audit firm should not offer any opinion on the level of support being offered by the parent company The statement could open up the audit 30 firm to liability issues should Branson Co face further financial difficulties which the parent company is not able to support. 这里存在着与可持续经营相关的重大不确定性，但是已有信息中表述很模糊，应该对going concern做进一步测试，比如测算现金流等。应注意审计报告需要提及的是财务报表而非其 他的报告。此外，审计师不能对于母公司对子公司的支持状况发表意见，这种表述是不恰 当 的 。 Contract win A KAM is one of significance to the audit,and the extract does not give any information to describe or explain why the contract was significant to the audit.If the contract was a KAM,then in accordance with ISA 701 Communicating Key Audit Matters jn the Independent Auditor's Report,the auditor's report should contain a description of: why the matter was determined to be one of the most significant in the audit and therefore determined to be a KAM,and how the matter was addressed in the audit. Neither of these required descriptions has been provided and therefore either the contract win is not a KAM and should not be included,or it is a KAM,for example,in the auditor's evaluation of going concern,but the descriptions are inadequate and not in compliance with ISA701. In addition,the auditor's comment regarding the contract 'eliminating going concern problems' seems to contradict both the audit findings and the statement in the draft auditor's report which states that there are significant uncertainties over going concern.The KAM section should not be used to provide additional explanation regarding matters disclosed or discussed elsewhere in the auditor's report,so it is not appropriate to provide additional information or an opinion about going concern in the KAM section. The auditor should not comment on the operations of the client company,such as the success in winning a tender anywhere in the auditor's report.This impairs the objectivity of the auditor's report and is not appropriate.Referring to a competitor of the company is extremely unprofessional and could result in legal action being taken against the audit firm. 此处需要对contract win做出进一步解释，以及为什么可以作为KAM出现，否则此事不应包 含在KAM当中，而且这里审计师给出的“消除可持续经营问题”,与审计报告中其他的内 容是冲突的，KAM不应该提供额外的意见，因此这么做是不恰当的。此外，审计师不应当 对于企业的经营状况发表任何的意见，这会影响到审计师的独立性。而且也不应当提及竞 争对手的名字。 Professional marks will be awarded for the demonstration of skill in analysis and evaluation,professional scepticism and judgement,and commercial acumen in your answer. (5 marks) Professional skills marks Analysis and evaluation Appropriate assessment of the ethical and professional issues raised,using examples where relevant to support overall comments Evaluation of the information to provide an appropriate conclusion using examples from the scenario to support the decisions made Professional scepticism and professional judgement - Effective challenge and critical assessment of the matters with appropriate conclusions - Demonstration of the ability to probe into the judgemental areas of due diligence engagements including the identification of missing information or additional information which would be required - Effective critical assessment of the evidence supplied with wider implications Commercial acumen - Demonstrates commercial awareness regarding the possible professional issues which may affect the audit firm Maximum marks 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION Advanced Audit and Assurance (AAA)(INT) 2024.09-2025.06 高顿ACCA 考纲解析白皮书 (选修科目) 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION AAA Advanced Audit and assurance (高级审计与鉴证业务)2024.09-2025.06 目录 1.科目关联性 2 2.近2年全球通过率：2 3.Syllabus and Study Guide 考试大纲与科目知识结构 3 4.考纲解析(新旧考纲的主要变化)3 5.考试形式 4 6.学习建议 4 7.考试思路 4

stem_zh: 1. 科目关联性 AAA 是 ACCA 战略专业阶段课程中唯——门和审计相关的课程，它更深入地阐述了高级审计经理或审计合 伙人在宏观环境下如何把控风险和有效分配资源。 AAA 的基础课程是 AA,同时也会涉及 SBR 中学习的大 部分会计准则。 Strategic Business Reporting (SBR) Advanced Audit and Assurance Audit and Assurance (AA) 2.近2年全球通过率： The Global Pass Rate of Advanced Audit and Assurance in the Past 2 Years 年份 03/2022 06/2022 09/2022 12/2022 03/2023 06/2023 09/2023 12/2023 Pass rate 33% 31% 34% 32% 34% 34% 34% 34% 3.Syllabus and Study Guide考试大纲与科目知识结构 Professional and ethicalconsiderations(B)Quaity management(C)Planning and conducting an audit of historical financial information(D)Completion and reporting(E)Other assignments(F)Current issues and development(G)Regulatory environment(A)Employability andProfessional skills(H)technologyskills(1) Professional and ethical considerations(B) Quaity management(C) Planning and conducting an audit of historical financial information(D) Completion and reporting(E) Other assignments(F) Current issues and development(G) Regulatory environment(A) Employability and Professional skills(H) technology skills(1) 4 . 考纲解析(新旧考纲的主要变化) C1d: Quality management,知识点不变，只是强调学生仍然会被要求，考虑在给定场景中的项目质量管理问 题 。 D1c: Planning and risk Assessment, 知识点不变，仅仅只是修改措辞以明确LO(learning outcome)。 F3,4,5 Other assignments, 改变了顺序，以帮助学习和理解信息。 The audit of social,environmental,sustainability and integrated reporting,由于越来越重视社会、 经济和可持续性问题等领域的鉴证服务， F5 变更为侧重该问题的新部分。 G2a: Current issues and developments:Developments in sustainability assurance, 将 可 持 续 发 展 相 关 的 鉴 证 服 务 列 入 新 LO。 5.考试形式 考试时长：3小时15分，50分及格(满分100) 考试形式：机考 CBE; 考试版本：INT version; 考试题型：包含 section A&Section B 两个部分。 6.学习建议 AAA 作为审计科目，其中会涉及很多专业术语，考生需要对此部分内容有专业认知；此外考试还会涉及一 些会计准则、金额、百分比、时间、数字的考察，希望考生可以集中笔记，有效备考； 此外，AAA 课程偏文字，很多考生备考时只是死记硬背，机械式记忆。2018年以来， ACCA AAA 在考试 题型和内容上存在明显创新。考核重点也从法律概念的理解转移到了实务应用，对知识点的理解的广度和 深度上考试要求有明显增加。因此需要考生在背诵考点的同时，加以理解和记忆，这种方法不但能够理解 知识，并且能够让中国学生增强英语的语感。但是，需要注意的是，我们一再强调的，学习可以从背诵记 忆开始，但绝不能仅仅停留在背诵记忆的阶段。 7.考试思路 AAA 偏文字，若时间跨度太长，容易忘记。建议有效学习时间为1.5个月，学完一个章节的内容对应作一 个章节的题目，有效掌握知识点，并从中划分出易错点，以及自己的薄弱环节，以待查漏补缺； 整体知识点学习结束后，集中备考4周。先巩固知识脑图、课堂笔记，;之后开始完整mock 的答题，此 时可结合相关笔记查阅知识点；最后模拟考试环境，定时3h15min, 保证正确率达到65%。 8.使用官方机考平台的优点 √ 了解该科目考试题型、分值分布 √ 独立、限时模考，提升答题感觉 √ 模拟考试环境，熟悉机考平台操作界面和各项功能键 √ 交卷后可核对正确答案，查漏补缺 9.使用官网机考练习平台操作说明 方法一：进 入ACCA Practice Platform 统一登录链接 https://cbeptcn.accaglobal.com/ 方法二：从 ACCA 官网-各科目学习资源页面进入 第 1 步 ：选择 “Question practice-ACCA Practice Platform” Learning and revision Effective learning and revisionCBE preparationExaminer's ReportsCBE question practice -ACCA Practice Platform第2步：点击 “Log in to the Practice Platform”Resources Effective learning and revision CBE preparation Examiner's Reports CBE question practice -ACCA Practice Platform 第2步：点击 “Log in to the Practice Platform” Resources Log in to the Practice Platform Launch external site 第3步：输入您的myACCA 账号和密码，完成登录 第4步：进入个人主界面，可选择科目和试卷 CatalogueAssigned Material Catalogue 此处可以选择科目 Advanced Audit &Assurance Advanced Financial Management 点击科目右侧的“+” 即可选择试卷ACCA Official Resources历年真题卷 Past exam libraryAPM March/June 2021(20/21 syllabus)AssignAPM September/December2020 exam (20/21 syllabus)Assignsigned to you yet.APM September/December2021 exam (21/22 syllabus)Assign官方练习卷及样卷Practice exams-valid from September 2022 + session onwards 点击科目右侧的“+” 即可选择试卷 ACCA Official Resources 历年真题卷 Past exam library APM March/June 2021(20/21 syllabus) Assign APM September/December 2020 exam (20/21 syllabus) Assign signed to you yet.
